hypothesis: If trained on preprocessed MP and OQMD datasets, diffusion-based generative models (CDVAE, GemsDiff, DiffCSP) will produce crystal structures that, after DFT relaxation, exhibit lower RMSD, lower energy-above-hull, and formation-energy/density distributions closer to the training data than structures produced by controlled perturbations, demonstrating the framework can distinguish chemically realistic generation from random distortions.
